summary: ANDROID ⛔ CLOUD ☁️ Policy locked on phone but with wrong value
scenario: Poly Lens Cloud policy locked settings show incorrect displayed value on Poly Studio Mobile app for Voyager Free 20, showing phone-set value instead of cloud-configured value
description_clean: When a policy is locked via Poly Lens Cloud for a connected Poly Voyager Free 20 device, the settings on the Poly Studio Mobile Android app show as locked (cannot be changed), but the displayed value is incorrect — it shows the value that was previously set on the phone instead of the value configured in the cloud policy. Expected behavior: The Sensors & Presence category should be available with settings that can be locked to a specific value, and the policy should be applied correctly.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Connect a Poly Voyager Free 20 device.
3. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [Voyager Free 20] → Audio Settings.
4. Using Poly Lens Cloud, create and lock a policy for the connected device that sets a specific value for a setting under the Sensors & Presence category (e.g., Wear Detection).
5. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and observe the Sensors & Presence settings.
6. Check the displayed value for the locked setting.
expected: The Sensors & Presence category should be available with settings that can be locked to a specific value. The displayed value in the app should match the value configured in the cloud policy.
actual: The displayed value shows the value that was previously set on the phone instead of the value configured in the cloud policy. The setting appears locked (cannot be changed) but shows incorrect data.
